headline: Clear calendar and quiet inboxes — ideal day to make deep progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), which ties directly to the Agents big rock evals initiative.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards work tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance AE-1079 design doc: Generated evaluations without ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set (risk of drift), and evals adoption is a key 26.4 deliverable per OKRs

must_make_progress.task: Review latest Agents bi-weekly TR page and align AE-1079 scope with 26.4 evals deliverables
must_make_progress.why: Ensure the design doc addresses what leadership expects for the evals track in the next TR review

must_communicate_with.about: Alignment on no-ground-truth evaluation approach — get early technical input before finalizing design doc
Coordinate on how generated evals intersect with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform)

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 progress and target completion date
must_report_status.note: Ticket has no due date — set one proactively and communicate it before next bi-weekly TR

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Key 26.4 deliverable; no data until Snowflake is restored

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake auth is broken (empty password) — no product metrics or funnel data available.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of silent slippage on a key evals deliverable.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in OKRs — monitor for spillover impact on your evals workstream.

outcomes.business_impact: No customer escalations or blockers visible today (though Salesforce is down); primary business value opportunity is advancing the evals design doc that underpins a core 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the key lever to unlock broader evals adoption by removing the ground-truth dependency barrier.

slack_summary: Zero-meeting day — best chance to make real progress on AE-1079 (generated evals without ground truth design doc), which is your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 evals deliverable. Top two urgents: (1) draft or significantly advance that design doc, and (2) fix broken Salesforce + Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and metrics. No meetings today.
